form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Comes off a 42 day let-up. Resuming 2nd of 7 at Turfway Park on February 18 over 1207m, 5 len behind My Own carrying 56kg at $17.29. Second run from a spell got back early 5th of 7 at Turfway Park on March 4 over 1308m, 4.5 len behind Dr Saikali with 56kg at $9.61. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 10 at Oaklawn Park February 7 over 1207m, 5 len behind Dreaminblue carrying 56kg at $22.20. When resuming last campaign second of 8 at this track October 8 over 1710m, a 0.3 lengths behind Eye Witness with 55.5kg at $9.23. Definite winning hope.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 7 at Turfway Park on March 4 over 1308m, 2.25 len behind Dr Saikali with 56kg at $29.80. Last start second last of 7 at Turfway Park on March 25 over 1207m, 10 len behind Baxley carrying 56kg at $20.22. Rates highly. Big chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming made ground from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Aqueduct on February 11 over 1207m, 5 len behind Breslau with 56kg at $3.42. Second-up 2nd in a small field at Aqueduct on March 14 over 1408m, 9 len behind Twenty Four Mamba with 56kg at $2.71. Rates highly and is among the main hopes.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 31-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Fairgrounds on March 15 over 1207m, 2.75 len behind Furio carrying 54.5kg at $5.40. Before that 4th of 10 at Fairgrounds on February 14 over 1207m, 5 len behind Maximum Bourbon with 54.5kg at $11.30. Genuine hope on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after three months won by 6 len at Fairgrounds March 8 over 1609m defeating Curahee carrying 55kg at $2.20. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Colonial Downs in LR on July 26 over 1408m, 12 len behind Patriot Spirit carrying 56kg at $11.50. Only needs to hold that form to be winning again. Improver with winning prospects.

Improver with winning prospects.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 5th of 10 at Fairgrounds on February 14 over 1207m, 7 len behind Maximum Bourbon carrying 54.5kg at $80.60. Last start second last in a small field at Fairgrounds on March 15 over 1207m, 8 len behind Furio carrying 54.5kg at $18.60. Wait until he shows more.
